meta.title: Contributing
meta.description: Learn how to submit a blog post to the BLEU community.

page.title: How to Submit a Blog Post
page.intro: We welcome contributions from the community! Our blog is fully open source, and anyone can submit a post via GitHub Pull Request.
page.templateEdit: Then edit the copied file and replace all placeholder values and content.
page.templateInline: If you prefer, here is the same template inline:

list.editFile: your copied file with your blog content
list.guideline1: Write about tech, learning, open-source, or community topics
list.guideline5: Add a thumbnail image if possible (16:9 ratio recommended)
list.review2: Maintainers will review for quality and guidelines
list.review3: You may receive feedback or suggestions
list.review4: Once approved, your PR is merged
list.review5: GitHub Actions builds and deploys automatically
list.review6: Your blog is live within minutes!

template.title: Your Awesome Title
template.author: Your Name
template.excerpt: A brief description of your post (1-2 sentences)
template.body: Your content here. Use standard Markdown!
